untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) opening range narrow band specification (no standard opening range indicator available), (2) price halting at extreme end of opening range (requires intrabar/tick-level analysis not supported), (3) coincidence with support/resistance on higher timeframes (requires multi-timeframe comparison logic), (4) breakout failure threshold measurement (quantification not provided by author). Core pattern recognition logic cannot be expressed with available indicators and operators.
translation_notes: This signal describes a complex intraday pattern requiring opening range analytics, multi-timeframe support/resistance detection, and breakout failure quantification. The available indicator set lacks opening range bands, intrabar extrema detection, and cross-timeframe comparison capabilities. A practical implementation would require: custom opening range calculation (e.g., first N bars high/low), Donchian channels for range extrema, and pivot points as proxy for multi-timeframe S/R, but the specific 'halting at extreme' pattern cannot be reliably translated without author-specified parameters.
